manifest.title: Spring Gamma v3：三周数据质量与消融研究
manifest.description: Causal three-week data-quality, date-block ablation and matched 0DTE/1DTE executable-mark audit for Spring Gamma v3.

query.sql: SELECT 'audit/order_map_pricing/date=*/reports.jsonl' AS audited_source_path, 'parsed by scripts/build_spring_gamma_v3_research.py' AS method
query.description: Parses report session, visible headline side, ES reference and causal forward labels.
filters: status reports with parseable ES; target on same date within ±180 seconds
metric_definitions: Raw ES delta = future ES − origin ES.
Headline continuation = visible side × raw ES delta.
30m and 60m labels overlap at a 15m origin cadence.

query.sql: SELECT 'features/spxw_0dte_greeks_reference/date=*/snapshots.jsonl' AS audited_source_path, 'parsed by scripts/build_spring_gamma_v3_research.py' AS method
query.description: Extracts quality-valid GEX proxy and gross Greek magnitude features.
filters: latest quality-valid feature no older than 300 seconds
metric_definitions: GEX proxy uses Call positive and Put negative; dealer position sign is unknown.
Gross Gamma, Charm and Vanna require aggregate.quality=ok.
Charm is an absolute-magnitude gate only, not a direction feature.

query.sql: SELECT 'features/iv_surface/date=*/hour=*/snapshots.jsonl' AS audited_source_path, 'parsed by scripts/build_spring_gamma_v3_research.py' AS method
query.description: Extracts zero-gamma, expected move, skew ratios and walls using creation time.
filters: front expiry must match report expiry
latest valid structure no older than 600 seconds

query.sql: SELECT 'lake/quotes/schema=v1/date=*/provider={ibkr,schwab}/hour=*/quotes.parquet' AS audited_source_path, 'parsed by scripts/build_spring_gamma_v3_research.py' AS method
query.description: Audits append-only raw quote facts for synchronized 0DTE versus next-listed-expiry entry and fixed-horizon exits. Every selected row must retain its raw JSONL source path and SHA256.
filters: RTH directional origins on raw-overlap dates 2026-07-16–23
Same provider, option right and strike; common strike nearest frozen wall
quality=live; two-sided; received_at <= decision time; age <=15 seconds
Entry at ask; 15/30/60m fixed exit at bid; no interpolation or imputation
metric_definitions: P&L points = exit bid − entry ask; one SPX contract is points × $100.
1DTE means next listed SPXW expiry; Friday maps to Monday.
Date-block bootstrap resamples whole trading dates.
Expiry touch is a separate realized SPX path metric through 16:00 ET.

query.sql: SELECT 'scripts/build_spring_gamma_v3_research.py' AS audited_source_path, 'parsed by scripts/build_spring_gamma_v3_research.py' AS method
query.description: Performs deterministic coverage, tertile and expanding date-block ablation calculations.
filters: First four dates train; each later date is predicted from prior dates only
Feature scaler is fit on training rows only
No random split and no future feature carry
metric_definitions: Spearman is an in-sample descriptive statistic.
WF ΔR² = 100 × (1 − feature-model SSE / training-mean baseline SSE).
All reader-facing numerical values are rounded to two decimals.

charts.title: 0DTE−1DTE 平均 P&L（按 ET 分段与持有期）
charts.subtitle: 正值偏向 0DTE；>=13:00 ET 每格仅 6–8 个样本，三个日阻断区间都跨 0
charts.question: Does the matched executable P&L difference support a 13:00 ET tenor switch?
charts.rationale: Grouped bars expose sign instability across horizons and cutoff cohorts; the adjacent table retains confidence intervals.

tables.title: 0DTE/1DTE 严格配对覆盖
tables.subtitle: Denominator is every directional RTH report on raw-overlap dates; unmatched legs or horizons drop both tenors.

tables.title: Ask 入 / Bid 出的单腿墙位路径反事实
tables.subtitle: One-contract P&L; $ P&L uses the SPX $100 multiplier. No commissions, fill probability, queue or impact.

tables.title: 配对期限差：正值才表示 0DTE 更好
tables.subtitle: Difference is 0DTE P&L minus 1DTE P&L on the identical signal/provider/right/strike/exit clock; CI resamples whole dates.

tables.title: 逐日 matched P&L 显示结果由少数日期主导
tables.subtitle: Each row keeps the two tenors on an identical matched sample.

tables.title: 逐日 expanding walk-forward 期限选择
tables.subtitle: For each test date, the tenor is chosen only from earlier matched dates' mean P&L; the rule is diagnostic, not a fitted production policy.

tables.title: 到期墙位触达是独立价格路径指标
tables.subtitle: Realized SPX crossing through 16:00 ET; this is not a risk-neutral probability and is not mixed with fixed-window P&L.

tables.title: Raw JSONL lineage is enforced
tables.subtitle: The Parquet fact table is used for efficient scanning, but every selected row must point to a raw JSONL file and carry a SHA256.

tables.title: 期限反事实的数据与执行契约
tables.subtitle: Every exclusion is deterministic and applied symmetrically.

tables.title: 可用标签不是零，但 RTH 只有七个方向日
tables.subtitle: All counts are causal links; observations at 15-minute cadence are not independent trades.

tables.title: Latest-valid 覆盖掩盖了 GTH 当前帧缺口
tables.subtitle: 95% Wilson intervals; coverage-oriented caps are 300s for Greeks and 600s for IV.

tables.title: GTH 的 Europe 段最缺 gross Greek
tables.subtitle: Directional origins split by ET session segment.

tables.title: 当前帧经常 degraded；LOCF 只能用于研究覆盖
tables.subtitle: Nearest raw Greek snapshot at each directional report origin, without latest-valid substitution.

tables.title: Usable-ratio 分布有明显选择偏差
tables.subtitle: Quantiles use only current snapshots with a numeric usable ratio.

tables.title: 逐日样本显示周一至周三并非没有标签
tables.subtitle: Raw and directional cohorts are shown separately; dates with no origin are absent.

tables.title: 方向延续 gate 消融：RTH 与 GTH 必须分开
tables.subtitle: Target is visible headline side × later ES move. Positive WF ΔR² beats a training-mean baseline.

tables.title: Raw ΔES 负对照：绝对 Greek 不能直接当方向
tables.subtitle: This control intentionally removes the visible headline side from the target.

tables.title: v3 参数先标准化，再做弱 gate
tables.subtitle: These are implementation contracts, not fitted production thresholds.

tables.title: 先验必须弱，且不得用小样本锁死符号
tables.subtitle: Suggested priors are research defaults only.

tables.title: 所有生产晋级条件目前都未满足
tables.subtitle: Promotion requires independent forward evidence, not overlapping report labels.

tables.title: 当前证据无法训练的目标
tables.subtitle: These exclusions prevent false precision and label leakage.

tables.title: 可执行 mark 对照已补齐，但真实 fill 与样本仍不足
tables.subtitle: Keep 0DTE and 1DTE side by side in shadow; the matched counterfactual does not authorize a hard switch.

tables.title: Causal join 与数据契约
tables.subtitle: The Greek clock limitation is explicit; IV uses created_at.

blocks.body: # Spring Gamma v3：三周数据质量与消融研究

## 结论：RTH 不是没有信号，但证据不足以调生产参数

**RTH 有 92 个方向 origin，15/30/60m 可联结标签为 74/71/60；所以“完全没有信号”不成立。** 真正的问题是只有 7 个 RTH 方向日，标签在 15 分钟 cadence 下重叠，而且 Greek 当前帧大多 degraded。Latest-valid 后 RTH Charm 覆盖 96.74%，GTH 只有 60.00%；后者不能和 RTH 共用参数。

RTH 60m 的 gross Gamma / Charm gate 在本样本 WF ΔR² 分别为 7.93% / 11.17%，但只有 30 个 forward 标签、3 个测试日。GTH 60m net-GEX gate 为 4.13%。这些结果只够提出弱 gate，不够拟合硬阈值。

**Spring Gamma v3 维持 shadow-only。Charm 只作幅度/质量 gate，不能给方向；Call+/Put− GEX 也不是 dealer inventory sign。期限反事实在 6 个原始行情重叠日得到 58 个成对 entry，但 13:00 ET 后各 horizon 只有 6–8 个 matched outcome，仍不能证明硬切换。**

## 期限反事实：13:00 ET 后没有足够证据选 0DTE

在 79 个 raw-overlap RTH 信号中，58 个能在同一决策时刻找到同源、同权利、同执行价的 0DTE/下一到期双边报价；固定 15/30/60m 的完整 ask→bid 配对为 44/42/40。

13:00 ET 后 0DTE−1DTE 平均 P&L 差在 15/30/60m 分别为 0.09 / 0.36 / -0.39 点；对应 whole-day bootstrap 区间为 [-0.24, 0.39] / [-0.38, 0.78] / [-2.14, 0.86]，全部跨 0。**因此 13:00 不是已验证的最优切换点。**

全 RTH 的 60m 配对差为 -0.79 点，区间 [-1.26, -0.30]，样本内偏向 1DTE；但只有 5 个 outcome 日，且两期限的绝对中位 P&L 仍为负，只能保留为 shadow 假设。

## 日期阻断：周一至周三不能被当作几十笔独立交易

逐日表保留相同配对样本；walk-forward 每个测试日只用更早日期的平均 P&L 选择期限。13:00 ET 后常见单日只有 1–2 个 outcome，期限选择随日期与 horizon 翻转，正是不能调硬参数的原因。

## 墙位触达与固定窗口 P&L 完全分离

触达只回答“SPX 是否在 16:00 ET 前穿过报告时刻冻结的方向墙”；它不是风险中性概率，也没有被拿来替代 15/30/60m 的 ask→bid P&L。已经越过或不在方向前方的墙位不进入触达分母。

## 周一至周三有标签，缺的是独立会话

按日期阻断后，RTH 只有 7 个方向日，GTH 只有 8 个。同日 15/30/60m 标签仍高度重叠，所以 origin 数不能当作独立交易数。

## GTH 稀疏是真问题，尤其是 Europe 时段

研究覆盖允许 Greek 向后携带最多 300 秒、IV 最多 600 秒，且只携带质量有效值；这不是生产 freshness 建议。生产建议收紧为 RTH Greek 120 秒 / IV 360 秒，GTH Greek 300 秒 / IV 600 秒。缺失值保留 missing flag，绝不补零。

## 消融只支持 session-specific 弱 gate

方向延续消融先用报告可见 side 定义目标；绝对 Gamma/Charm/Vanna 本身不被当作方向。Spearman 与 tertile 是全样本描述；WF 从前 4 个日期开始，逐日扩展训练，标准化只拟合训练集。RTH 与 GTH 的高/低 exposure 关系反向，禁止合并训练。

## v3 规格：标准化、质量门、弱先验

建议先构造 session-specific 标准化特征，再用低自由度线性/逻辑 gate。Charm 的唯一合法角色是环境幅度 gate；它不产生 Call/Put 方向。数值阈值在满足晋级标准前保持研究默认，不写入生产执行。

## 限制：可执行 mark 反事实仍不是真实成交回测

期限表使用真实 point-in-time bid/ask，并把买入记 ask、卖出记 bid；它仍不含手续费、排队、部分成交、拒单、市场冲击或账户仓位，因此不能解释账户亏损，也不能证明可交易 edge。ES 标签来自后续报告值。Greek 只有 `as_of`，没有独立 `created_at`，所以无法度量其 ingestion latency。期限反事实只是同一墙位路径的方向单腿代理，不是重建后的 vertical spread；也没有把 ATM IV term gap、Theta/Gamma 或风险中性触达概率加入选择器。

## 可复现性：扫描压缩事实表，但逐行验证 raw lineage

为避免反复解析数十 GB JSONL，研究用 DuckDB 扫描 append-only Parquet 事实表；每个入选报价必须保留 `raw/provider=.../quotes.jsonl` 路径和非空 SHA256。任何缺腿、过期或不完整 horizon 都对两个 tenor 对称删除。

## 下一步：先积累独立 forward evidence

保持 v3 shadow-only；逐期记录 feature age、missing flags、session、方向 gate 与后续非重叠 outcome。达到 20+20 完整会话和每 horizon 100 个非重叠标签后，再冻结候选阈值并做 date-block CI。期限层继续并列记录 0DTE/1DTE；补齐真实 fill/fee 和 vertical-spread 双腿后，再评估动态期限选择，不做 13:00 ET 生产硬切换。

coverage.validity_rule: same IV snapshot has both ratios
same IV snapshot has spot+both walls
same IV snapshot has both ratios
same IV snapshot has spot+both walls
same IV snapshot has both ratios
same IV snapshot has spot+both walls
same IV snapshot has both ratios
same IV snapshot has spot+both walls

normalization.transform: Scale net GEX to $bn; clip ratio to training 1/99%

normalization.missing_rule: Same causal IV snapshot; keep missing flag

normalization.transform: Put ratio−Call ratio; side-aligned wall room
normalization.missing_rule: No NBBO interpolation; smooth IV/structure only

normalization.transform: log1p magnitude and Charm/Gamma equivalent points
normalization.missing_rule: Gate only; never infer direction from absolute Charm

weak_priors.status: Optional weak prior; do not sign-constrain
Optional weak prior; do not sign-constrain

promotion_readiness.current: 7 directional RTH days; 8 directional GTH days

promotion_readiness.minimum: Same effect sign on ≥4 forward days
≥2% relative MSE/log-loss gain; date-block CI excludes 0
promotion_readiness.current: No estimable stable CI with 3–4 test days

untrainable.why: Dealer inventory sign is unknown; available GEX is Call+/Put− house proxy
Zero-gamma transition dominates because ±0.5% is checked first
Only four usable late-window days; insufficient regime support
Only 7–8 directional days; degrees of freedom exceed evidence
Ask-entry/bid-exit counterfactual is available, but causal fill, fee, queue, impact and account-position labels remain absent
Raw market data exists but production report/FSM history does not
同刻可执行对照已补齐，但 >=13:00 ET 每个 horizon 仅约 5–6 个 matched 样本，日阻断区间不足以判定最优 tenor

tenor_availability.promotion_use: Coverage denominator is explicit; no imputation

tenor_availability.shadow_capture: Entry at ask and fixed-horizon exit at bid; quote/source ages <=15.00s
tenor_availability.promotion_use: Compare conservative executable marks, not model mid

tenor_availability.shadow_capture: Limit, fill price/time, partial fill, reject and cancel
tenor_availability.promotion_use: Estimate realized slippage and selection bias
Condition tenor choice on term structure

tenor_availability.current_outcome: Frozen wall has a separate realized SPX path-to-16:00 label
tenor_availability.shadow_capture: Wall, origin spot, direction, path coverage and realized touch
tenor_availability.promotion_use: Path metric only; never substitute it for risk-neutral probability

tenor_availability.shadow_capture: Leg Greeks, spread Greeks, fees and conservative slippage
tenor_availability.promotion_use: Compare expected edge after decay and cost

data_contract.implementation: Same trading date; target ±180s; ES source compatible

data_contract.limitation: No independent created_at; ingestion latency is unobservable
Research cap is coverage-oriented, not production freshness

data_contract.implementation: Per quality-valid feature, backward only within cap

data_contract.limitation: Only IV surface and structural functions may be smoothed

data_contract.implementation: Same provider/right/strike; latest <=15s quote as of origin and each fixed exit; ask in / bid out
data_contract.limitation: Missing pair drops both tenors; compacted rows require raw path and SHA256 lineage

expiry_touch.metric_type: Realized SPX path; not risk-neutral probability
Realized SPX path; not risk-neutral probability
Realized SPX path; not risk-neutral probability

tenor_methodology.implementation: Exact persisted directional RTH report; Call for bullish, Put for bearish; report SPX and directional wall frozen at origin
tenor_methodology.limitation: Directional single-leg wall proxy; not a reconstructed vertical spread

tenor_methodology.implementation: Same provider, right and strike for 0DTE and next listed SPXW expiry; common strike nearest frozen directional wall
tenor_methodology.limitation: Friday next listed expiry is Monday; calendar DTE can exceed one

tenor_methodology.implementation: Latest live two-sided raw quote received at or before origin; age <= 15.00s; buy at ask
tenor_methodology.limitation: No queue, fill, commission or market-impact label

tenor_methodology.implementation: Latest live two-sided raw quote as of exactly 15/30/60m; age <= 15.00s; sell at bid
tenor_methodology.limitation: Unmatched horizons are dropped from both tenors

tenor_methodology.implementation: 4000 deterministic whole-day bootstrap replications; expanding past-days-only tenor choice
tenor_methodology.limitation: Only six overlapping RTH dates and overlapping 15-minute origins

tenor_methodology.implementation: Separate realized SPX path crossing of the frozen directional wall by 16:00 ET
tenor_methodology.limitation: Not risk-neutral probability and never mixed into fixed-window P&L
